evals.prompt: I need cert expiry for example.com, api.example.com, and mail.example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the expiry-monitor skill for this expiry monitor request and produce the documented result for example.com, api.example.com, and mail.example.com.
expectations: Selects expiry-monitor for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_expiry_monitor.
Keeps the response focused on monitoring certificate expiration across multiple targets with urgency classification (Expired, Critical <=7d, Warning <=30d, Healthy).

evals.prompt: Handle a focused expiry monitor workflow for example.com, api.example.com, and mail.example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the expiry-monitor skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects expiry-monitor instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
